_purpose: Per-LLM-provider API version strings sent as HTTP headers. The shipped mChatAI+ binary carries a frozen fallback (see ProviderAPIVersionsService.fallback in Swift); the runtime reads from this file via MchataisourceCacheService so a provider deprecating a version (the kind of break that hits 'on a random Tuesday') gets a same-day fix via PR + refreshMchataisourceCache instead of an App Store cycle.
_anthropic_notes: Anthropic's versioning is by release date. 2023-06-01 is the original public-launch version and still works for the messages API. Bump if Anthropic publishes a newer compatible version; verify against the messages endpoint before publishing.
_azure_notes: Used for Azure-routed OpenAI deployments only. See CloudProviderAPIService.swift.
